pages.title: Knight Seventeen
pages.text: Appears in:$(li)Kamen Rider Zeztz: Series of Sister's Substory Agent Minami (2025, web series)$(br2)Transforms with the $(l:zeztz/devices/knight_invoker#knight_invoker_seventeen)Knight Invoker$(/l)$(br2)Status Effects:$(li)Punch III$(li)Strength VI (with empty hand)$(li)Strength (with weapon)
